requirement_topic.en: IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 Electrical Safety — Heat Pumps, Air Conditioners and Dehumidifiers
requirement_topic.zh: IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40电气安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机
requirement_topic.zht: IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40電氣安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機

summary.en: IRAM (Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación) adopts IEC standards as IRAM-IEC standards, including IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 for the safety of household and similar electrical heat-pump appliances, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers. This standard forms the mandatory technical basis for INTI product certification of heat pumps and split-system air conditioners in Argentina. Testing must be conducted at a laboratory recognised or accredited by INTI. The standard covers electrical, mechanical, thermal, and refrigerant-circuit safety requirements, including flammable-refrigerant provisions aligned with IEC 60335-2-40 Edition 6 (A2:2018) amendments regarding A2L and A3 refrigerant use. ENACOM (Ente Nacional de Comunicaciones) is the relevant body for radio/EMC compliance if the product incorporates wireless connectivity.
summary.zh: IRAM（阿根廷标准化与认证协会）将IEC标准采纳为IRAM-IEC标准，包括适用于家用和类似用途电热泵、空调器和除湿机安全的IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40。该标准构成INTI对阿根廷热泵和分体空调产品认证的强制技术依据。检测须在INTI认可或认证的实验室进行。该标准涵盖电气、机械、热学和制冷回路安全要求，包括与IEC 60335-2-40第六版（A2:2018）修正案一致的关于A2L和A3类制冷剂使用的可燃制冷剂条款。若产品包含无线连接功能，ENACOM（国家通信机构）为无线电/EMC合规的主管机构。
summary.zht: IRAM（阿根廷標準化與認證協會）將IEC標準採納為IRAM-IEC標準，包括適用於家用和類似用途電熱泵、空調器和除濕機安全的IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40。該標準構成INTI對阿根廷熱泵和分體空調產品認證的強制技術依據。檢測須在INTI認可或認證的實驗室進行。該標準涵蓋電氣、機械、熱學和製冷回路安全要求，包括與IEC 60335-2-40第六版（A2:2018）修正案一致的關於A2L和A3類製冷劑使用的可燃製冷劑條款。若產品包含無線連接功能，ENACOM（國家通訊機構）為無線電/EMC合規的主管機構。

standards_or_laws: IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers, Argentina/IEC adoption)
IRAM-IEC 60335-1 (general safety requirements for household electrical appliances)
ENACOM regulations for radio and EMC compliance (Argentina, where wireless is present)

summary.en: China's CCC scheme requires heat pumps and air conditioners to comply with GB 4706.32 (safety of household air conditioners, IEC 60335-2-40 adopted with modifications) and GB 4343.1 (EMC). CCC testing is performed at CNCA-designated laboratories using Chinese GB standards. While GB 4706.32 and IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 share an IEC 60335-2-40 lineage, the specific edition, national deviations, and laboratory accreditation under each scheme are separate; CCC test reports are not accepted by INTI as equivalent evidence.
summary.zh: 中国CCC制度要求热泵和空调器符合GB 4706.32（家用空调器安全，参考修改采用IEC 60335-2-40）和GB 4343.1（EMC）。CCC检测在CNCA指定实验室按中国GB标准进行。尽管GB 4706.32和IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40同源于IEC 60335-2-40，但两制度下的具体版本、国家差异及实验室认可各自独立；CCC测试报告不被INTI接受为等效证据。
summary.zht: 中國CCC制度要求熱泵和空調器符合GB 4706.32（家用空調器安全，參考修改採用IEC 60335-2-40）和GB 4343.1（EMC）。CCC檢測在CNCA指定實驗室按中國GB標準進行。儘管GB 4706.32和IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40同源於IEC 60335-2-40，但兩制度下的具體版本、國家差異及實驗室認可各自獨立；CCC測試報告不被INTI接受為等效證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 (safety of household air-conditioning appliances, China — IEC 60335-2-40 adoption with modifications)
GB 4343.1 (EMC for household and similar apparatus, China)

gap.en: Although GB 4706.32 and IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 both derive from IEC 60335-2-40, Chinese CCC test reports are not accepted by INTI. The Argentine importer must arrange IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 testing at an INTI-recognised laboratory for type-approval purposes. Chinese exporters should provide full technical files, construction drawings, component data, and sample units to support this testing. Where the product includes Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or other wireless modules, ENACOM homologation is a separate requirement alongside INTI certification.
gap.zh: 尽管GB 4706.32和IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40均源自IEC 60335-2-40，中国CCC测试报告不被INTI接受。阿根廷进口商须安排在INTI认可实验室进行IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40检测，用于型式批准。中国出口商应提供完整技术文件、结构图、元件数据及样品以支持检测。若产品包含Wi-Fi、蓝牙或其他无线模块，ENACOM认证是INTI认证之外的单独要求。
gap.zht: 儘管GB 4706.32和IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40均源自IEC 60335-2-40，中國CCC測試報告不被INTI接受。阿根廷進口商須安排在INTI認可實驗室進行IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40檢測，用於型式批准。中國出口商應提供完整技術文件、結構圖、元件數據及樣品以支持檢測。若產品包含Wi-Fi、藍牙或其他無線模組，ENACOM認證是INTI認證之外的單獨要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 compliance via INTI-recognised laboratory testing; ENACOM homologation mandatory where wireless connectivity is present
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory GB 4706.32 compliance via CCC; not recognised as equivalent by INTI

source.publisher: IRAM (Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación), Argentina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40 testing at an INTI-recognised laboratory is mandatory for Argentine type-approval; GB 4706.32 CCC test evidence is not accepted. Chinese exporters must supply technical files and samples to support a fresh Argentina-specific safety test. Wireless products additionally require ENACOM homologation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——在INTI认可实验室进行IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40检测是阿根廷型式批准的强制要求；GB 4706.32 CCC测试证据不被接受。中国出口商须提供技术文件和样品以支持全新的阿根廷专项安全测试。含无线功能的产品还须额外获得ENACOM认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——在INTI認可實驗室進行IRAM-IEC 60335-2-40檢測是阿根廷型式批准的強制要求；GB 4706.32 CCC測試證據不被接受。中國出口商須提供技術文件和樣品以支持全新的阿根廷專項安全測試。含無線功能的產品還須額外獲得ENACOM認證。
